title: Epigenetics and Epigenomics: Implications for Diabetes and Obesity.
author: Rosen ED Kaestner KH Natarajan R Patti ME Sallari R Sander M Susztak K
content: S-EPMC6463748 PMC6463748 Epigenetics and Epigenomics: Implications for Diabetes and Obesity. The American Diabetes Association convened a research symposium, "Epigenetics and Epigenomics: Implications for Diabetes and Obesity" on 17-19 November 2017. International experts in genetics, epigenetics
